name: Lord-Aquilor
warscroll: •STORMCAST ETERNALS WARSCROLL•Lord-Aquilor14"83+2The Lord-Aquilors are the leaders of the Vanguard Auxiliary chambers, hunters and warriors both who ride ahead of the Stormhosts to deliver an arrow-swift assault.
